creator: frank@vogon.agala.harz.de
text:
Trying to run wine results in the message 

	/kernel: shared address space fork attempted: pid: 40325

	and wine hangs.

Fix: 

Don't know. I tried the fixes for current from luoqi's page,
	but 3.2 and 4.0 are too different.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Try to use wine from the ports collection on a SMP machine.
